error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: OpenAI Chat Model node parameters issue
symptom: When using the OpenAI Chat Model node with the model 'gpt-4o-search-preview', an error occurs stating 'Bad request - please check your parameters'. This indicates that incompatible request arguments are being supplied.
not_this_if: Parameters are explicitly set to compatible values
root_cause: The 'gpt-4o-search-preview' model does not support certain default parameters like frequency_penalty, n, presence_penalty, temperature, and top_p. When these parameters are included in the request, it results in a bad request error.
fix_steps: Add an HTTP Request Node to your workflow.
Configure the node with Method: POST and URL: 'https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions'.
Set the Headers: 'Content-Type: application/json' and 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_OPENAI_API_KEY'.
In the Body field, add the appropriate JSON structure without the unsupported parameters.
agent_instruction: Use an HTTP Request Node to call the OpenAI API directly with the correct parameters.
